title: Lunaria
description: Lunaraia is a large modpack for Forge that blends together a diverse tapestry of technology, adventure, and magic.
body:
# Lunaria
Lunaraia is a large modpack for Forge that blends together a diverse tapestry of technology, adventure, and magic. Dive into a world full of advanced technology, explore vast landscapes with formidable bosses, and immerse yourself in a wealth of magic.

[Here you can download the server files for the newest version.](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/v13uyljimza8wl4kt7l6n/Lunaria-Server-2.6.x.zip?rlkey=c93kqw173zl1k40xqwzc9h9jx&st=70fqh0co&dl=1)  If you want to create it yourself, just copy the mods and config folders.
